name: Stir Fried Asparagus
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut asparagus into 1-inch pieces and steam lightly.
2. Mix 1/2 cup water and the dry boullion; reserve.
3. Mix cornstarch and 1 tbsp cold water; reserve.
4. Heat oil in a wok or 12-inch skillet over medium heat.
5. Add asparagus, mushrooms, salt, and pepper.
6. Stir fry for about 1 minute.
7. Stir in the bouillion mixture and heat to boiling.
8. Stir in the cornstarch mixture. Cook until thickened, about 10 seconds.
9. Serve as a side dish or entree. 90 calories per serving.
